description: Science Fiction Morphus table (Dark Designs (WB6), pp. 50-52). Percentile bands: 01-06% Bug-Eyed Monster, 07-15% Energy Blaster, 16-24% Flight Pack/Thrusters, 25-33% Force Field Array, 34-42% Heavy Sci-Fi Armor, 43-51% Hologram Projector, 52-61% Light Sci-Fi Armor, 62-71% Personal Scanner/Sensors, 72-80% Sci-Fi Melee Weapon(s), 81-90% Sci-Fi Optics, 91-00% Universal Translator.

entries.name: Bug-Eyed Monster
entries.description: The Nightbane resembles an alien from another world — classic Grey, Grade-B sci-fi creature, or other monstrous (non-attractive) extraterrestrial look with oversized eyes and/or insect or crustacean features.
customOneOffs: STUB: Hands, body type, and optional-feature sub-rolls are not yet modeled. Likely cross-table alternatives include Alien Shape, Biomechanical, and Extraterrestrial tables.

entries.name: Light Sci-Fi Armor
entries.description: The body of the Morphus appears to be sheathed in a full suit of advanced body armor, including a helmet that fully covers the face, which may or may not be visible. This armor typically looks to be composed of overlapping plates but may incorporate form-fitting mesh, rubberized pieces, ceramic material, etc. Whatever it is, the armor looks like a high-tech, light, environmental body armor or plated spacesuit.
customOneOffs: The armor is environmentally sealed so the 'Bane does not need air to breathe and is immune to airborne irritants, toxins, and poisonous gases.
(like most repairs, Art, Pick Locks, Pick Pockets, etc.).

entries.name: Heavy Sci-Fi Armor
entries.description: This is a full suit of advanced, heavy body armor that covers the Morphus from head to toe. It is an environmental suit and is much heavier and bulkier than the light armor for greater protection in combat. It may have a high-tech mechanical look or may have an organic, resin or genetically engineered appearance. As a heavy armor, it is an augmentation system that slightly boosts the Nightbane's strength.
customOneOffs: The armor is environmentally sealed so the 'Bane does not need air to breathe and is immune to airborne irritants, toxins, and poisonous gases.
(like most repairs, Art, Pick Locks, Pick Pockets, etc.).

entries.name: Flight Pack/Thrusters
entries.description: This feature may appear as a number of things from a flame-spewing jet pack, to a series of anti-gravity nodes built into various points of the Morphus form, to organic looking tubes growing out of the back or behind the shoulders. Regardless of the look, this feature offers the ability of high-speed, wingless flight.
customOneOffs: +1 to Awe/Horror Factor when flying.
+4 to dodge when traveling at 60 mph (96 kph) or faster.
+2 to damage for physical attacks per 20 mph (32 km) of speed above 40 mph (64 kph).
Flight pack regenerates at the same rate as the Nightbane, taking a full day to regenerate if completely destroyed. It is inoperable while regenerating.
Cannot hover (built for speed).

entries.name: Energy Blaster
entries.description: Whether a handheld weapon or one built into the body of the Morphus form, this feature provides a long-range energy weapon. The look may vary from high-tech to organic but always looks futuristic or alien/strange.
customOneOffs: Fueled by the Nightbane's P.P.E. Deals 1D6 damage per point of P.P.E. expended, with a maximum of 10 points able to be spent per attack.
Damage inflicted by the energy blaster is NOT considered magical or supernatural in nature.
Reduces the number of starting Talents by one.

entries.name: Sci-Fi Melee Weapon(s)
entries.description: This feature provides a futuristic melee weapon (or pair if one-handed) that can be energized to deal additional damage. The weapon itself can look like any real or imagined weapon from a knife or sword to a battle-axe or mace, but typically has artistic accents and features that set it apart from mundane versions.
customOneOffs: Small weapons do 1D6 damage; large weapons do 2D6 damage.
By expending 3 P.P.E. per melee round for a small weapon or 6 P.P.E. for a large weapon, base damage is doubled and inflicts triple damage to Nightlords and their demonic minions.
Do NOT add Supernatural P.S. punch or any strength bonuses to energized weapon damage.
+1 to Awe/Horror Factor when the weapon is energized.
Grants the appropriate Weapon Proficiency skill for the weapon while in Morphus form.
Cannot be forcibly taken or disarmed. Anyone else trying to use the weapon finds it deceptively heavy and poorly balanced (-6 to strike, parry, and disarm).

entries.name: Universal Translator
entries.description: This feature usually takes the shape of a futuristic earpiece, mask, or cell phone-like mini-computer, and sometimes what looks to be a cybernetic implant in the ear, head, or neck. It allows the Nightbane to understand and speak ALL languages with 98% fluency.
customOneOffs: Ability to understand and speak all languages with 98% fluency. Even alien languages never heard on Earth will be comprehended.

entries.name: Sci-Fi Optics
entries.description: Most often appearing as a helmet, goggles, visor, or mechanical/cybernetic eye(s), this feature enables the Nightbane to see in a variety of different ways and in different spectrums of light.
customOneOffs: Includes a laser rangefinder, telescopic zoom (2 mile/3.2 km range), low-light compensation, infrared and ultraviolet view modes, macro-lens (20x magnification), and an auto-tint feature that protects against bright light.
Can see heat signatures through smoke, thin walls, and follow footsteps less than 10 minutes old.
A virtual targeting reticule is superimposed over vision in combat.
For an expense of 3 P.P.E., the Nightbane can see the magically invisible (1,000 ft/305 m range) for one minute per level of experience.

entries.name: Personal Scanner/Sensors
entries.description: The Morphus has a small device that is handheld or cybernetic and built into the hand, forearm, shoulder, or head. This device incorporates a variety of sensory equipment with various capabilities.

gimmickInventory.effectFormula: Scans biometrics up to 10 ft (3 m) away. Identifies body temperature, blood pressure, oxygen, bleeding, disease, and broad emotional states.
Picks up electromagnetic radiation from electronic devices and magnetic fields up to 50 ft (15.2 m).
Detects nuclear radiation levels and sources up to 50 ft (15.2 m).
Tracks up to 20 flying objects up to 30 miles (48 km) with a 25 ft (7.6 m) floor. +1 to strike flying opponents; halves darkness/blindness penalties.
Monitors changes in air pressure to detect moving objects up to 100 ft (30.5 m). Cannot be surprised from behind or above; halves darkness/blindness penalties.
Determines chemical composition (down to 20 ppm) up to 25 ft (7.6 m) away.
Detects strong magical energy signatures (ley lines, nexus points, magic items, beings with 70+ P.P.E.) up to 30 ft (9.1 m) away.

customOneOffs: EACH selected scan feature imposes a cumulative penalty of -1 M.A. and -1D4 from the permanent P.P.E. base.

entries.name: Hologram Projector
entries.description: The Nightbane's Morphus form has a futuristic-looking camera built into the body (usually the head, shoulder or forearm) or carried on the person. This is actually a complex projector capable of creating holograms. 3-dimensional images made of light. Such holograms have no substance but look completely real from any angle and can even fool beings immune to magical illusions.
customOneOffs: Holograms may cover an area up to 10x10x10 feet and project as far as 50 feet away.
The projector can only operate for 5 minutes out of any one hour period before needing to recharge from the character's bio-kinetic energy.
Disguise and Camouflage skills operate at 80% or receive a +20% bonus (whichever is higher) when using the projector for disguise or concealment.

entries.name: Force Field Array
entries.description: A series of nodes or small, electronic patches are built into the Morphus or incorporated into some kind of harness or full-body suit. This system projects a form fitting energy field that defends against a variety of attacks. The force field protects the Nightbane from poison gases and fumes, as well as kinetic and energy attacks.
customOneOffs: The force field provides an additional 1D6x10+200 S.D.C. Damage is subtracted from this force field before the character's personal S.D.C. or Hit Points.
The force field regenerates S.D.C. at the same rate as the Nightbane normally heals. If reduced to zero S.D.C., it is unavailable for 6 hours.
Immune to gases, poison, and diseases while the force field is up.
To activate Talents or cast spells, the force field must be dropped while P.P.E. is expended, leaving the Nightbane open to attack for 2D4 seconds.
A Nightbane with this feature can never develop Talents that create a magical protective field (e.g., Shadow Shield or Pipe Bomb).
